Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./docs/master-audit-report.json'\); console.log\('JSON valid. findings:', d.consolidatedFindings.length, '| sources:', d.auditSources.length, '| topInsights:', d.topInsights.length, '| kpis:', d.kpis.length, '| unresolved:', d.unresolvedQuestions.length\);")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\);const byRule={};let warn=0,err=0;for\(const f of r\){for\(const m of f.messages\){const id=m.ruleId||'\(parse\)';byRule[id]=byRule[id]||{n:0,sev:m.severity,files:new Set\(\)};byRule[id].n++;byRule[id].files.add\(f.filePath\);if\(m.severity===2\)err++;else warn++;}}console.log\('errors:',err,'warnings:',warn\);const a11y=Object.entries\(byRule\).filter\(\([k]\)=>k.startsWith\('jsx-a11y'\)\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1].n-a[1].n\);console.log\('\\n--- jsx-a11y rules ---'\);for\(const [k,v] of a11y\)console.log\(v.n+'\\t'+k+'\\t\('+v.files.size+' files\)'\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('/tmp/eslint.json'\);const byRule={};let warn=0,err=0;const mine=[];for\(const f of r\){for\(const m of f.messages\){const id=m.ruleId||'\(parse\)';\(byRule[id]=byRule[id]||{n:0}\);byRule[id].n++;m.severity===2?err++:warn++;if\(/seo[\\\\/].__tests__|seo.test|golf-swing|tennis-swing|baseball-swing|softball-swing|layout.tsx/.test\(f.filePath\)\)mine.push\(f.filePath.split\('swingiq'\)[1]+' :'+m.line+' '+id\);}}console.log\('errors',err,'warnings',warn\);console.log\('\\nby rule:'\);for\(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(byRule\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1].n-a[1].n\)\)console.log\('  '+v.n+'  '+k\);console.log\('\\nwarnings in files I touched this sprint:', mine.length\); mine.slice\(0,20\).forEach\(x=>console.log\('  '+x\)\);")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{if\(!d.trim\(\)\){console.log\('no output'\);return;}const r=JSON.parse\(d\);const byRule={};let warn=0,err=0;const mine=[];for\(const f of r\){for\(const m of f.messages\){const id=m.ruleId||'\(parse\)';\(byRule[id]=byRule[id]||{n:0}\);byRule[id].n++;m.severity===2?err++:warn++;if\(/\(seo\\b|seo\\.test|golf-swing|tennis-swing|baseball-swing|softball-swing|app.layout\)/i.test\(f.filePath\)\)mine.push\(f.filePath.split\('swingiq'\)[1]+':'+m.line+' '+id\);}}console.log\('errors',err,'warnings',warn\);console.log\('by rule:'\);for\(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(byRule\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1].n-a[1].n\)\)console.log\('  '+v.n+'  '+k\);console.log\('my-file warnings:',mine.length\);mine.slice\(0,15\).forEach\(x=>console.log\('  '+x\)\);}\);")
